fictional_local_slate.name: Canal AI Summit
fictional_local_slate.focus: Applied GenAI for product and platform teams
fictional_local_slate.audience: Engineering leaders, staff+ ICs, AI PMs
fictional_local_slate.miro_angle: Run an AI architecture clinic that maps agent handoffs, human review, and model evaluation in one board.
fictional_local_slate.watch_for: Enterprise adoption stories, copilots moving from pilots to production, and platform-team playbooks.

fictional_local_slate.name: Lowlands LLM Builders Week
fictional_local_slate.focus: Hands-on LLM tooling, evals, and retrieval systems
fictional_local_slate.audience: Applied ML engineers, developer advocates, startup founders
fictional_local_slate.miro_angle: Host collaborative prompt-debugging and eval design sessions directly on Miro canvases.
fictional_local_slate.watch_for: Reusable RAG patterns, developer tooling launches, and demand for visual experimentation workflows.

fictional_local_slate.name: North Sea Responsible AI Forum
fictional_local_slate.focus: Governance, compliance, and human-in-the-loop AI systems
fictional_local_slate.audience: Security leads, legal partners, product ops
fictional_local_slate.miro_angle: Position Miro as the place teams align policy, architecture, and launch checklists before shipping AI features.
fictional_local_slate.watch_for: EU AI Act readiness, approval workflows, and cross-functional review rituals.

fictional_local_slate.name: Amsterdam Applied AI Days
fictional_local_slate.focus: Production ML, copilots, and AI-native product design
fictional_local_slate.miro_angle: Demo how product, design, and engineering teams storyboard AI experiences together before implementation.
fictional_local_slate.watch_for: AI UX patterns, multimodal feature launches, and partner ecosystem announcements.

fictional_local_slate.name: Graph + Agents Europe
fictional_local_slate.focus: Knowledge graphs, agent memory, and orchestration
fictional_local_slate.audience: Platform engineers, data engineers, solution architects
fictional_local_slate.miro_angle: Show graph-backed agent systems as living diagrams with linked implementation notes and review comments.
fictional_local_slate.watch_for: Long-lived agent state, graph retrieval design, and multi-agent operational tooling.

fictional_local_slate.name: Tulip City AI Infra Meetup
fictional_local_slate.focus: GPU ops, inference performance, and cost control
fictional_local_slate.audience: Infra teams, DevOps leaders, FinOps stakeholders
fictional_local_slate.miro_angle: Pair infra diagrams with budgeting and incident-response workflows on the same board.
fictional_local_slate.watch_for: Inference optimization, batch-vs-real-time tradeoffs, and platform cost narratives.

fictional_local_slate.name: Winter AI Collaboration Assembly
fictional_local_slate.focus: Team workflows for AI delivery across product, design, and engineering
fictional_local_slate.miro_angle: Anchor Miro around planning, review, and retrospective rituals for AI product teams.
fictional_local_slate.watch_for: Org design for AI teams, operating cadences, and templates that shorten time-to-launch.

major_ai_conferences.name: NeurIPS
major_ai_conferences.long_name: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
major_ai_conferences.audience: ML researchers, applied scientists, AI platform teams
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Run a research-roundup board capturing the year's most influential papers, with diagrams linking themes (alignment, agents, multimodality).

major_ai_conferences.name: ICLR
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Cluster accepted papers on a Miro board by research theme to spot emerging directions before they hit production.

major_ai_conferences.name: ICML
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Capture key tutorials and workshops as visual learning paths for engineering teams ramping on a new ML sub-field.

major_ai_conferences.name: CVPR
major_ai_conferences.long_name: Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition
major_ai_conferences.audience: Computer vision researchers, AR/VR teams, multimodal AI
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Use Miro to storyboard vision-language pipelines and label the human-review steps that surround them.

major_ai_conferences.name: ACL
major_ai_conferences.long_name: Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Map an LLM-application architecture (prompts → retrieval → evals) against ACL's freshest evaluation methodology papers.

major_ai_conferences.name: KDD
major_ai_conferences.long_name: ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
major_ai_conferences.audience: Data scientists, ML engineers, applied AI teams
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Translate KDD's applied tracks into delivery-ready Miro playbooks — data prep, training, evaluation, monitoring.

major_ai_conferences.name: AWS re:Invent
major_ai_conferences.audience: Cloud architects, platform engineers, AI infra teams
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Run a re:Invent diff board that maps new AI infra services onto existing customer architectures.

major_ai_conferences.name: Google I/O
major_ai_conferences.audience: Product engineers, AI app developers, mobile/web teams
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Diagram Gemini/Workspace launches against Miro's AI-collaboration story to find integration angles.

major_ai_conferences.name: Microsoft Build
major_ai_conferences.audience: Developer tooling, copilots, enterprise AI buyers
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Plot Copilot, Azure AI Foundry, and Windows AI announcements as a single platform map on Miro.

major_ai_conferences.name: OpenAI DevDay
major_ai_conferences.audience: LLM application developers, AI product teams
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Capture new API surface area on a Miro board and link each capability to a Miro template idea.

major_ai_conferences.name: GitHub Universe
major_ai_conferences.audience: Developer tooling teams, DevOps, platform engineers
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Storyboard the developer-loop changes (Copilot, Actions, Issues) and how they show up in collaboration tools.

major_ai_conferences.name: QCon
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Distill QCon track keynotes into one Miro 'patterns wall' the whole engineering org can revisit.

major_ai_conferences.name: KubeCon
major_ai_conferences.audience: Platform engineers, SREs, AI infra teams
major_ai_conferences.miro_angle: Map AI/ML workloads onto Kubernetes reference architectures using Miro mind maps.
